rationale: The ensures is an implication `P ==> det_set_ref_count_equal(...)`, so P is NOT a free hypothesis in the body — that is why the prior attempt's bare `assert(post1_self_.page_array@[i].addr =~= pre_self_.page_array@[idx].addr)` failed (those equalities are conjuncts of the antecedent P, not body-known facts). Wrap the entire proof in `if P { ... }`, which introduces P as a hypothesis inside the branch and makes the implication vacuously true outside. Inside, prove pointwise page_array equality by case-splitting on `i == index` (8 field equalities at the modified index via P's per-field clauses, including `ref_count =~= ref_count` for both posts; transitivity through pre off-index), lift to view equality via `=~=`, then conclude the synthetic `det_set_ref_count_equal` — its remaining field-view equalities follow from struct equality through pre.
